title: デビュー戦の後に・伝説級のるんるん

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Woooo?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is going on here? This is slow going,
even for a debut race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The runners start off at such a relaxed pace, it's
like they were going for a stroll, not a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when they near the end, the speed picks up
until the runners all hurtle past the finish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I'm back from my leisurely run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose she got lucky today. The other racers
matched her pace, waiting to speed up in the
final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if she continues at this tempo, she'll only be
able to go so far. It'll be difficult to make
progress in her schedule and races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is something the matter?
choice_data_list:
We should talk about your schedule moving
forward.

We should talk about your schedule moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dearie. That sounds like I'll be racing almost
nonstop for a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You wish for me to adopt a fast-paced schedule
so that I might adapt to the rigor of the Twinkle
Series, no?
choice_data_list: Right. At the rate we're going now...
Right. At the rate we're going now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's top goal is to win the Classic
Triple Crown next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with doing things at one's
own pace, but with her easygoing demeanor, we
might run out of time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, Trainer. I have something to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly think a schedule like that would suit
me? I find taking things slow and steady far more
comfortable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we should set our sights a little higher.
How does the Hopeful Stakes sound?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes! Since it is a race scheduled in
December, I can take my time training. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If I compete in the Hopeful Stakes, I will be
making the contribution I've desired to for so
long.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Bringing honor to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
All Umamusume in the Mejiro family are brought
up believing that one day they can fulfill that
promise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"The Mejiro Umamusume are children of light,
admired by all."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However, because I'm so easygoing, I haven't
managed to add even the slightest flicker of light
to our name. Not once in my life have I won.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So I wish to compete as soon as I can in a G1 and
contribute to the glory of the Mejiros. No matter
what. At any cost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running the Hopeful Stakes before the G1
Classics... It's certainly an option, but only if she's
legitimately got a shot at pulling it off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I agree to anything, I need to know that
she's capable and determined...
choice_data_list: Do you have the confidence to do it?
Do you have the confidence to do it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The confidence... How could I possibly?
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...I know that I must do it. Because I am a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the ease with which she speaks, an
intense light burns in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no guarantee she will win, but she has the
purpose to try. In that case...
choice_data_list: I understand. Let's run in the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You agree? Oh, what good news!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Without question, I will endeavor to run
satisfactorily and produce a shining light for the
Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her feelings persuade me to take this small risk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But preparing for the G1 Hopeful Stakes won't be
easy.
